creator: sri.chityala501@gmail.com
text: I have written zfs install script for custom partitions. but we have a challenge in the current script it will detect hard disks type(as primary disk) like ada*(iso) and vtbd*(cloud server like digital ocean) since we came across these type of disks only. but when we install OS with custom zfsinstall script in physical machines we are getting diff type of hard disks. can you please tell me how many types of hard disks will support by freebsd
